name: setBusinessAccountName
description: Changes the first and last name of a managed business account. Requires the can_change_name business bot right

parameters.name: business_connection_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the business connection

parameters.name: first_name
parameters.description: The new value of the first name for the business account; 1-64 characters

parameters.name: last_name
parameters.description: The new value of the last name for the business account; 0-64 characters
